message:
feat(router): add route-level security requirements and priority docs

Router trie enhancements:

1. RouteSecurityRequirement struct
   - scheme: security scheme name (must match OpenAPI components)
   - scopes: optional OAuth2 scopes
   - new(scheme): create requirement without scopes
   - with_scopes(scheme, scopes): create with scope list

2. Route security methods
   - security_scheme(name): add scheme without scopes
   - security(scheme, scopes): add scheme with scopes
   - Multiple calls allow OR semantics (any scheme suffices)

3. Route matching priority documentation
   - Static segments > named parameters > wildcards
   - Examples showing /users/me vs /users/{id} resolution
   - Conflict detection rules explained

OpenAPI spec integration:
- Route security requirements converted to OpenAPI SecurityRequirement
- Per-operation security in generated spec
- Tests for scheme-only, scopes, and multiple schemes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
